description: The Mexican Mafia, also known as La eMe, is a predominantly Mexican American prison gang and criminal organization in the United States. Founded in 1957 by Luis 'Huero Buff' Flores at Deuel Vocational Institution in California, it is considered the deadliest and most powerful gang within the California prison system. The organization controls many Hispanic street gangs in Southern California and is involved in drug trafficking, extortion, and murder.
